name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-5
title: Dead code, unused imports, and committed __pycache__ in rabbit-file
description: Housekeeping items: (1) file-item.py imports 'json' but never uses it; (2) item-status.py imports 'json' but never uses it; (3) test-file-item.py line 76 'import branch_ops' is shadowed/unused then re-imported via __import__; (4) scripts/__pycache__/ and test/__pycache__/ are present in the working tree - should be gitignored; (5) scripts/.gitkeep and skills/rabbit-file/.gitkeep remain even though real files now exist alongside them; (6) Many helpers in branch_ops.py lack type hints (_git, _branch_exists_on_remote, _init_orphan_branch, _ensure_branch, _worktree) while public API has partial hints - inconsistent.
